name: incorta-upgrade-assistant
description: AI-powered pre-upgrade readiness assistant for Incorta clusters. Validates cluster health, analyses Zendesk tickets and Jira bugs, checks Cloud Portal metadata, tests datasource connectivity, and generates a filled Excel pre-upgrade checklist — all from a single conversation.

tools.name: extract_cluster_metadata_tool
tools.description: Extract upgrade-relevant metadata from CMC: deployment type, DB type, topology, features, and infrastructure.

tools.name: test_datasource_connections
tools.description: Test all datasource connections on the Incorta Analytics instance and report pass/fail per datasource.

tools.name: cloud_portal_connect
tools.description: Authenticate with Cloud Portal via OAuth. Step 1: get a login URL. Step 2: call again to confirm and cache the token.

tools.name: get_cloud_metadata
tools.description: Fetch Cloud Portal cluster metadata: Spark/Python versions, sizing, feature flags, consumption, and authorized users.

tools.name: generate_upgrade_readiness_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive upgrade readiness report combining CMC, Cloud Portal, Zendesk, Jira, and knowledge base data. Outputs a risk rating and Excel checklist data.

tools.name: write_checklist_excel
tools.description: Fill the 2-sheet Incorta pre-upgrade checklist template (Summary + Pre-Upgrade Checklist) with the readiness report data and return a downloadable Excel file.

tools.name: search_upgrade_knowledge
tools.description: Search Incorta documentation and community articles for upgrade guidance.

tools.name: query_upgrade_tickets
tools.description: Query Zendesk customer support tickets using Spark SQL. Auto-includes schema. If no SQL provided, returns schema only.

tools.name: query_upgrade_issues
tools.description: Query Jira engineering bugs and fixes using Spark SQL. Auto-includes schema. If no SQL provided, returns schema only.

cmc_url.title: CMC URL
cmc_url.description: Your Incorta CMC base URL. Example: https://your-cluster.cloudstaging.incortalabs.com/cmc

cmc_cluster_name.title: CMC Cluster Name
cmc_cluster_name.description: The cluster name as it appears in CMC. Example: customCluster

incorta_username.title: Incorta Username
incorta_username.description: Incorta Analytics username for the customer cluster

incorta_password.title: Incorta Password
incorta_password.description: Incorta Analytics password for the customer cluster

incorta_analytics_url.title: Incorta Analytics URL
incorta_analytics_url.description: Customer's Incorta Analytics URL (must end with /incorta). Example: https://your-cluster.cloudstaging.incortalabs.com/incorta

cloud_portal_email.title: Cloud Portal Email
cloud_portal_email.description: Your Incorta Cloud Portal email address. Used to authenticate and cache your Cloud Portal JWT.
